title: VeinMinerX
description: Mine entire ore veins at once by sneaking and breaking a single block — lightweight, configurable, and compatible with vanilla enchantments.
body:
# VeinMinerX

Mine entire ore veins at once by sneaking and breaking a single block — lightweight, configurable, and compatible with vanilla enchantments.

## How it works

1. **Sneak** (shift) and break an ore block with a pickaxe
2. All connected ore blocks of the **same type** are mined instantly
3. Drops, Fortune, and Silk Touch work exactly like vanilla

- Your pickaxe **never breaks** — mining stops at 1 durability remaining
- **Unbreaking** enchantment is fully supported (reduces durability loss chance)
- Works with all ore types including Deepslate and Nether ores

## Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| `/vmx` | Show plugin info | — |
| `/vmx reload` | Reload configuration | `veinminerx.reload` (op) |

## Permissions

- `veinminerx.use` — Use the vein mining feature *(default: everyone)*
- `veinminerx.reload` — Reload config *(default: op)*
- `veinminerx.update.notify` — Receive update notifications on join *(default: op)*

## Configuration

- **Mineable ores** — Choose exactly which ores can be vein mined
- **Max vein size** — Limit how many blocks are mined at once (default: 64)
- **Require sneak** — Toggle whether sneaking is needed to trigger vein mining
- **Require permission** — Restrict usage to players with `veinminerx.use`
- **Damage tools** — Enable/disable durability damage on vein mine
- **Drop experience** — Enable/disable XP drops from vein mining
- **Chat messages** — Fully customizable with color codes
- **Hot reload** — Change settings without restarting your server
- **Update checker** — Automatically checks Spigot for new versions on startup and notifies operators on join
